ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory configuration */,
  "associativity" INTEGER /* Associativity of the cache (e.g., 1, 2, 4) */,
  "mem_size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory in KB */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size in bytes */,
  "cache_type" TEXT /* Type of cache (e.g., L1, L2, L3) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Memory technology used (e.g., DDR4, DDR5) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the memory module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated memory configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific test metadata */,
  "misses" INTEGER /* Number of cache misses recorded during the test */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of accesses during the test */,
  "miss_rate" REAL /* Calculated miss rate as a percentage */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency observed during the test */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Data throughput in MB/s */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES memory_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the testing conditions and purpose */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., stress test, standard test) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Testing environment details (e.g., hardware setup) */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations_tests" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory configuration used */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark test conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration-test link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_tests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES memory_configurations ("config_id")
)
